headline: Tesla Investor Names His Choice For 'CEO Of The Year' And The Honor Goes To ... (Hint: It Isn't Elon Musk)

headline: Elon Musk Calls Out Amazon's Double Standards As Social Media Users Point To 'Hamas-style' Headband Sold On E-Commerce Giant's Platform
summary: Elon Musk took at a swipe at Amazon for hawking "Hamas-style" headband on its platforms even as it paused ads on X.

headline: Elon Musk Reacts As Tesla's 'iPhone Moment' Plays Out With Fans Queuing Up To Catch Glimpse Of Cybertruck In Showrooms Ahead Of Launch
summary: Ahead of the Cybertruck launch, the EV is creating all the right noises, with people queueing up before showrooms to get a glimpse of it.
